Emblem of Severed Fate.four_piece: Increases Elemental Burst DMG by 25% of Energy Recharge. Max 75% DMG bonus.

Noblesse Oblige.four_piece: Using an Elemental Burst increases all party members' ATK by 20% for 12s.

Golden Troupe.four_piece: Increases Elemental Skill DMG by 25%. Additionally, when not on the field, Elemental Skill DMG is further increased by 25%.
